free_text: Fission fragment formation cross sections in the
fission of U-233, U-235 and U-238 with 90-MeV C-12
The targets were prepared by electrodeposition of
uranium oxide on 26.2 um aluminum foils
Chemical separation of antimony, tellurium and
iodine was undertaken in separate runs in order to
detect as many isotopes as possible for the elements.
No information on source of uncertainties
Tbl. on p.112
According to memo CP-D/202.
According to memo CP-C/196.
